title: tragia mitis var. genuina
intro: Tragia mitis var. genuina, also known as the False Nettle, is a plant species in the Euphorbiaceae family, commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are attributed to its sap and leaves. The health benefits of Tragia mitis var. genuina include the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and wounds, as well as its use as a natural remedy for fever and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and sap are often used to create topical creams and ointments, as well as teas and infusions for internal use.
